Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}It feels nice, being able to pour tea for someone else like this...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}I'm supposed to be the host, and yet here I am thinking about myself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 0 25 25}How about you, then? Are you having a good time?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Chamomile is known for its relaxing properties, so maybe that's taking its effect on you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 3 25 25}I... was actually a bit worried that I might be putting you off.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Apparently, the popular opinion is that I'm difficult to approach...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 0 25 25}Sorry about that. Try to relax, if you can...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Then again, if it were that easy, it wouldn't be a problem, would it?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 3 25 25}Apparently, the popular opinion is that I'm difficult to approach...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 1 25 25}My apologies. Let me take care of that for you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Heh, I'm glad you aren't afraid to speak up when you want something.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 0 25 25}Apparently, the popular opinion is that I'm difficult to approach...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 0 25 25}Hm? We're running low on snacks. I'll have to ask my staff to—[cr][n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Oh, never mind. Here, let me pour you another cup.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I drank herbal tea with Mitsuru as[n]we discussed our favorite snacks...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}All right, I think that's enough for now. We should start cleaning up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 1 25 25}{f 5 13 4 1 5}I'd like to invite you for this again, if time allows.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 0 25 25}But for now, let's head back to our rooms.[n]{f 1 1}
